plan: 1. Create `src/features/browse/BrowseAllCards.tsx` ‚Äî component that imports `cardDeck` from `src/data/loadCardDeck.ts`, maps over all cards, and renders each using the existing `CardVisual` component. Include a heading (e.g. 'Browse All Cards') and a card count.

2. Create `src/features/browse/BrowseAllCards.module.css` ‚Äî responsive grid layout using CSS Grid with `auto-fill` / `minmax()` for card columns. Use existing design tokens for spacing. Ensure cards stack single-column on mobile (<600px), 2-col on tablet, 3-col on desktop.
3. Add empty state handling in `BrowseAllCards` ‚Äî if `cardDeck` is empty or undefined, render a friendly empty-state message (e.g. 'No cards available') instead of the grid.
4. Export `BrowseAllCards` from `src/features/browse/index.ts` (replace the existing empty stub).

5. Install `react-router-dom` and set up client-side routing in `src/App.tsx` ‚Äî wrap app in `BrowserRouter`, add `Routes`/`Route` for `/browse` ‚Üí `BrowseAllCards`, `/` ‚Üí Home placeholder. Update `Nav.tsx` to use `<Link>` instead of `<a>` tags.

6. Write unit tests in `tests/browse-all-cards.test.tsx` ‚Äî test that all 57 cards render, test empty state when data is missing, test that grid container has correct CSS class, test that CardVisual receives correct props.
7. Write Playwright E2E test in `tests/e2e/browse-page.spec.ts` ‚Äî navigate to `/browse`, verify heading visible, verify cards render (check count), verify responsive layout on mobile viewport.
8. Run `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, `npm run test`, and `npm run test:e2e` to verify all checks pass.
testing_recommendations: Unit test: BrowseAllCards renders all 57 cards from the dataset (check DOM count of card elements)
Unit test: BrowseAllCards shows empty state message when cardDeck is empty
Unit test: Each CardVisual receives correct card props (spot-check first/last card)
E2E test: /browse page loads with HTTP 200 and heading is visible
E2E test: All cards are present on the page (count card elements = 57)
E2E test: Cards are readable on mobile viewport (375px width) ‚Äî verify no horizontal overflow and text is visible
risks: No router exists yet ‚Äî adding react-router-dom is a new dependency and changes Nav from <a> to <Link>, which touches existing US-007/US-008 code and tests
CardVisual is styled with max-width 420px for single-card display ‚Äî may need minor CSS adjustments to look good in a dense grid of 57 cards
Vite config may need updating for SPA fallback (historyApiFallback) so /browse doesn't 404 on hard refresh
